title: French-Style Rice Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic side dish that pairs well with grilled meats.
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped xerisque and energetically; sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add chopped portuguese and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add uncooked rice and stir to coat with oil and mix with vegetables.
Add chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 18-20 minutes or until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and season with salt to taste.
